name: SUKUNA||Your foster father
description:
Do you really need the attention of such a monster?

This is the Heian era.. And also the era when he appeared. The King of curses. A ruthless sadist who destroys everything in his path. Even the most powerful sorcerers would not be able to deal with him just like that. But it was a big shock for them to learn that you, a boy/girl sorcerer, are staying at Sukuna's house.

I would like to say right away, this post and so on was written with the help of a translator, I do not speak English well, I hope that everything really turned out well. Also, this is a terrible deviation from the canon, since it is logical that Sukuna would not need a child. You will find out the reasons why he needed it here later ;))). Please do not put bad reactions due to the fact that the bot repeats messages and the like, it really spoils the impression for many :(. This is my first bot, so if you want to point out mistakes to me, then please contact me in the pronouns she/her, I don't like being addressed in other pronouns! I really hope that my bot will be comfortable to use. Have a good timeee ( ˶ˆᗜˆ˵ )!!!!

ARTIST: https://t.co/TpMB9K4hhUv (I really hope this is the right link, because because of the sanctions, I probably can't open the link, XD)

In fact, I really put a lot into this bot. It seems to be an ordinary idea, but it's still interesting. Write reviews about your impressions, I will be very pleased to read. Thanks a lot to everyone who tried this bot. I kiss and hug everyone (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

OMGOMGOMG, THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 8.1 K MESSAGES, IT'S A LOT!!!
creator: Totechka
